---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div><div><br /><i>*Disclosure of Material Connection: Most of the links on this page are “affiliate links". See the bottom of this page for details.</i><br /><h3>This page lists a variety of nonfiction books I found helpful as I strive to live #NoHiding.</h3><div><br /></div><h4 style="text-align: left;"><b><u>Building Radical Authenticity, Healthy Connection, and Rooted Identity:</u></b></h4><div><b><u><br /></u></b></div><div><div><div><b><i>Everything</i></b> by Authors Dr. Henry Cloud and Dr John Townsend<br /><ul><li>Start Here &gt;&nbsp;<a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#"><b>Boundaries</b> Updated and Expanded Edition: When to Say Yes, How to Say No To Take Control of Your Life</a></li></ul><ul><li><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">How To Get A Date Worth Keeping: Be Dating In Six Months Or Your Money Back</a></li></ul><div><ul><li><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Boundaries in Dating: How Healthy Choices Grow Healthy Relationships</a></li></ul><ul><li><a href="https://amzn.to/346HLj1" target="_blank">Boundaries in Marriage</a>&nbsp;Learn when to say yes and when to say no to your spouse to make the most of your marriage.</li></ul><ul><li><a href="https://amzn.to/3azyd2p" target="_blank">Boundaries with Teens: When to Say Yes, How to Say No</a></li></ul><ul><li><a href="https://amzn.to/33ZOETm" target="_blank">Boundaries with Kids: How Healthy Choices Grow Healthy Children</a></li></ul><ul><li><a href="https://amzn.to/3aB7sdZ" target="_blank">Safe People: How to Find Relationships that are Good for You and Avoid Those That Aren't</a>&nbsp;</li></ul></div><ul><li><div><a href="https://amzn.to/34482ic" target="_blank">How to Have That Difficult Conversation: Gaining the Skills for Honest and Meaningful Communication</a></div></li></ul></div><div><div><br /></div></div></div><div><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">The Emotionally Healthy Leader: How Transforming Your Inner Life Will Deeply Transform Your Church, Team, and the World&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;Author: Peter Scazzero<br /><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/2JylFMR" target="_blank">Scary Close: Dropping the Act and Finding True Intimacy</a>&nbsp;by Donald Miller&nbsp; (Author), Bob Goff (Foreword)</div></div></div><div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/3aAJgbP" target="_blank">If You're In My Office, It's Already Too Late: A Divorce Lawyer's Guide to Staying Together</a>&nbsp;by James J. Sexton&nbsp; (Author)</div><div><br /></div></div><div><div><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Leadership and Self-Deception: Getting Out of the Box</a>, by The Arbinger Institute<br /></div><div><br /></div></div><div><br /></div></div><div><h4 style="text-align: left;"><b><u>Healing and dealing with Greif, Trauma, Loss, and Hardship:</u></b></h4></div><div><b><u><br /></u></b></div><div><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Where Is God When It Hurts?</a>, by Philip Yancey<br /></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B00FAI58EK/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B00FAI58EK&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">Grace: The Power To Change</a>&nbsp;by Dr. James B. Richards<img border="0" src="https://images-blogger-opensocial.googleusercontent.com/gadgets/proxy?url=http%3A%2F%2Fir-na.amazon-adsystem.com%2Fe%2Fir%3Ft%3Dyour0f4d-20%26l%3Das2%26o%3D1%26a%3DB00FAI58EK&amp;container=blogger&amp;gadget=a&amp;rewriteMime=image%2F*" />&nbsp;(Author) GRACE! Only by realizing you can't change... can God finally change you from the inside out. A great read for addicts especially.</div><div><br /><a href="http://amzn.to/1UHvTvy">Secrets of the Secret Place </a>by Bob Sorge (Author) How to live a life of non-religious quiet times.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/#">The Shack: Where Tragedy Confronts Eternity</a> by William P. Young (Author). This is technically fiction but placed here because it's an allegory with profound truths and healing.<div><br /></div><div><br /></div><h4 style="text-align: left;"><b><u>Getting Physically Healthier</u></b></h4><div>When it comes to food, here's the bottom line: Eat Meat, Healthy Fats, and Veggies and Fruit. Cut out Grains, Dairy, and all added sweeteners (even monk fruit and stevia). To find out why go on a Whole30.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><a href="https://amzn.to/3bL1Q0O" target="_blank">It Starts with Food: Discover the Whole30 and Change Your Life in Unexpected Ways</a>, by Dallas and Melissa Hartwig ( #Whole30). Although there are about 200 pages of sceince and data, it's written for the laymen. Very easy to understand. It will radically change your relationship with food forever. And wait until you see all the ways the FDA has lied to you!&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/3dNP1F9" target="_blank">The Ketogenic Bible: The Authoritative Guide to Ketosis</a>&nbsp;by Jacob Wilson&nbsp; (Author), Ryan Lowery&nbsp; (Author). Much more science and history packed, but full of really great information. An intermediate read, but fascinating details about how the entire modern American diet was based on a lie and bad science.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div></div><div><br /></div><div><h4><b><u>Storytelling (Writing Craft)</u></b></h4><div><b><u><br /></u></b></div><h4><span style="font-weight: normal;">See my&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/writing-craft-database.html" target="_blank">Writing Craft Database (here)</a>&nbsp;</span></h4><div><span style="font-weight: normal;"><br /></span></div><div><br /></div><div><h4 style="text-align: left;"><b><u>Understanding Christianity and The Bible</u></b></h4><div><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><b>I moved all such links here:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.nohiding.faith/p/resources.html" target="_blank">NoHiding.Faith</a></b></li></ul></div><div><br /></div><div><h4 style="text-align: left;"><b><u>Business, Marketing, Leadership, and Entrepreneurship&nbsp;</u></b></h4></div><div><b><br /></b></div><div><b><br /></b><div><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B004DNJQI2/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B004DNJQI2&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">Simplify Your Life: Divine Insights to Uncomplicated Living [Hardcover]</a>, by Mac Hammond -&nbsp;Some of the MOST practical steps for living a successful life I've ever heard from anyone.</div><div><br /></div><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B0058DRUV6/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B0058DRUV6&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">Good to Great: Why Some Companies Make the Leap...And Others Don't</a><img border="0" src="https://images-blogger-opensocial.googleusercontent.com/gadgets/proxy?url=http%3A%2F%2Fir-na.amazon-adsystem.com%2Fe%2Fir%3Ft%3Dyour0f4d-20%26l%3Das2%26o%3D1%26a%3DB0058DRUV6&amp;container=blogger&amp;gadget=a&amp;rewriteMime=image%2F*" />, by Jim Collins -&nbsp;Arguably the best book written on how to run a great business... ever written.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div><i>*See my post on&nbsp;<a href="http://toposconsulting.blogspot.com/2014/03/the-hedgehog-sweet-spot-finding-your.html">The Hedgehog &amp; The Sweet Spot. Finding Your Unique Place In This World</a>, which was inspired by this book.</i></div><div><br /></div><div><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B00CF6WHNA/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B00CF6WHNA&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">Platform: Get Noticed in a Noisy World, a step-by-step guide for anyone with something to say or sell</a>, by Michael Hyatt -&nbsp;Taught me how to simplify my brand (still learning) and understand the personal brand elements.</div><div><br /></div><div><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/006227306X/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=006227306X&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">Jab, Jab, Jab, Right Hook: How to Tell Your Story in a Noisy Social World</a><img border="0" src="https://images-blogger-opensocial.googleusercontent.com/gadgets/proxy?url=http%3A%2F%2Fir-na.amazon-adsystem.com%2Fe%2Fir%3Ft%3Dyour0f4d-20%26l%3Das2%26o%3D1%26a%3D006227306X&amp;container=blogger&amp;gadget=a&amp;rewriteMime=image%2F*" />, by&nbsp;Gary Vaynerchuk -&nbsp;Taught me to give, give, give, give, give... times ten... before asking for a sale or a click.<br /><br /></div><div><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Atomic Habits: An Easy &amp; Proven Way to Build Good Habits &amp; Break Bad Ones</a>, by James Clear<br /></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/3aCJtuS" target="_blank">Marketing Made Simple: A Step-by-Step StoryBrand Guide for Any Business</a>&nbsp;by Donald Miller&nbsp; (Author), Dr. J.J. Peterson (Author)</div><div><br /></div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><i><br /></i></div><h3 style="text-align: left;"><i>The following are my readings lists, by year. Starting 2019 and forward.&nbsp;</i></h3><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i><b>In 2023 and beyond, I'm using <a href="https://www.goodreads.com/user/show/41133256-darrell-wolfe" target="_blank">GoodReads </a>instead of listing them here.</b></i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><div><u><b>2019-2022 I was in school for my BA in General Christian Studies... So...&nbsp;</b></u></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><span style="font-style: italic;">Reading List Bookmarks:</span></div><div><i><dl>
    <dt><a href="https://brill.com/view/journals/pneu/9/1/article-p1_1.xml">David du Plessis and the Challenge of Dialogue</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://content.time.com/time/magazine/article/0,9171,904121,00.html">Religion: Shapers and Shakers</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=David_du_Plessis&amp;oldid=933332487">David du Plessis</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.thefreelibrary.com/A+Pentecostal+looks+at+the+World+Council+of+Churches.-a016420085">A Pentecostal Looks at the World Council of Churches.</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/10.1111/(ISSN)1758-6623 (Subscriber access)">Two Extraordinary Pentecostal Ecumenists: the Letters of Donald Gee and David Du Plessis</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.encyclopedia.com/arts/educational-magazines/du-plessis-david-johannes-1905-1987">Du Plessis, David J(ohannes) 1905-1987 | Encyclopedia.com</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=afL_3rAM3yw">David DuPlessis  - "Forgiveness" June 30, 1967  pm</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.amazon.com/International-Dictionary-Pentecostal-Charismatic-Movements/dp/0310224810">DU PLESSIS, DAVID JOHANNES.</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://www.revival-library.org/index.php/pensketches-menu/american-pentecostal-pioneers/david-du-plessis">David du Plessis 1905 - 1987</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1987-02-05-mn-978-story.html">OBITUARIES : David J. du Plessis; Force in Pentecostal Movement - Los Angeles Times</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=William_M._Branham&amp;oldid=980093636">William M. Branham</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://drmsh.com/naked-bibles-inspiration-discussion/">Inspiration</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.britannica.com/biography/Saint-Augustine">Saint Augustine | Biography, Philosophy, Major Works, &amp; Facts | Britannica</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://netbible.com/copyright/">NET Bible®New English Translation (NET)</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.worldatlas.com/maps/israel">Israel Maps &amp; Facts</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://academic.oup.com/journals/pages/coronavirus">Access to OUP resources on COVID-19, other coronaviruses, and related topics</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=74uv0mJS0uM">Wired for story: Lisa Cron at TEDxFurmanU</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://wiredforstory.com/about" tags="Authorship,Creative writing,English language,Fiction,Rhetoric">Wired for story: the writer's guide to using brain science to hook readers from the very first sentence</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hSOef7lxTGo">The Beauty of Spiritual Language</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.95network.org/blog/bob-hamp-59">Doing Ministry From Jesus Instead of For Him (w/ Bob Hamp) - Episode 59</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.ancient-hebrew.org/studies-words/meaning-of-el-shaddai.htm">The Meaning of El Shaddai | AHRC</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://stanrock.net/2014/10/23/elihu-the-forgotten-prophet-of-job/">Elihu, the Forgotten Prophet of Job</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://nakedbiblepodcast.com/episodes/">The Naked Bible Podcast</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://dictionary.cambridge.org/us/">Cambridge Dictionary: Find Definitions, Meanings &amp; Translations</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://www.lexhampress.com">The Lexham English Bible (LEB), Fourth Edition</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="logos.com">Logos Bible Software 8.17 SR-38.17.0.0022</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://netbible.org/bible/Galatians+5">Galations 5 NET Bible</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="LexhamPress.com">The Lexham Bible Dictionary - Barry, J. D., Bomar, D., Brown, D. R., Klippenstein, R., Mangum, D., Sinclair Wolcott, C., … Widder, W. (Eds.). (2016). In The Lexham Bible Dictionary. Bellingham, WA: Lexham Press.</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://public.ebookcentral.proquest.com/choice/publicfullrecord.aspx?p=2030851">The Lost World of Genesis One: Ancient Cosmology and the Origins Debate.</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.holypost.com/">Holy Post Podcast</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://biblehub.com/commentaries/cambridge/luke/20.htm">Luke 20</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://biblehub.com/commentaries/cambridge/daniel/2.htm">CHAP. 2. NEBUCHADNEZZAR’S DREAM</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=lsdar&amp;AN=ATLA0000968471&amp;site=ehost-live" tags="Bible  . New Testament--Study and teaching--Methodology,Coins, Roman,Denarius (Coin),Iconography">'Show me a denarius': symbolism of Roman coinage and Christian beliefs</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.amazon.com/Josephus-Flavius-Historical-Background-Illustrated-ebook/dp/B00B4I367Q">Roman Currency</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://bible.ucg.org/bible-commentary/Ezra/Tattenai's-inquiry-regarding-the-temple-reconstruction-and-the-decree-of-Darius/">The Decree of Darius (Ezra 5:3-6:13) July 26-27</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=nlebk&amp;AN=77761&amp;site=ehost-live" tags="HISTORY / Middle East / Israel &amp; Palestine,Zionism--History">The History of Israel</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Hasmonean_dynasty&amp;oldid=988339182">Hasmonean dynasty</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.the-gospel-truth.info/bible-teachings/the-promise-to-abraham/">The Promises to Abraham</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://public.ebookcentral.proquest.com/choice/publicfullrecord.aspx?p=4188734">Raptureless</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://thechifiles.com/2017/10/30/render-unto-god-what-exactly/">Render unto God... what exactly? An examination of Matthew 22:15-22</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=lsdar&amp;AN=ATLAiREM190916000838&amp;site=ehost-live" tags="Biographies,Bonhoeffer, Dietrich,   , 1906-1945,Church and state,Discipleship,Germany,National socialism,Theologians, German">Dietrich Bonhoeffer and Confession of Christ Today</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.prepare-enrich.com/">PREPARE/ENRICH PREMARITAL AND MARRIAGE ASSESSMENT</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Herodians&amp;oldid=985436852">Herodians</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_English_Bible">The New English Bible (NEB) New Testament 1961</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://vftonline.org/VFTfiles/thesis/commentators/Rushdoony/RenderUntoCaesar.htm">Render Unto Caesar -- R.J. Rushdoony</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.christianitytoday.com/ct/1967/april-28/critique-of-political-gospel.html">A Critique of the ‘Political Gospel’</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=lsdar&amp;AN=ATLA0001660936&amp;site=ehost-live" tags="United States,Pastoral theology,Imperialism,Politics and government">Render unto Caesar: pastoral care and the American empire</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=lsdar&amp;AN=ATLA0001467401&amp;site=ehost-live" tags="United States,Civilization,Conservatism,Social conditions">Render unto Caesar?: the dilemmas of a multicultural world</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=nlebk&amp;AN=1228092&amp;site=ehost-live" tags="Politics in the Bible,RELIGION / Biblical Criticism &amp; Interpretation / General,RELIGION / Biblical Reference / General,RELIGION / Biblical Studies / General">Almighty Matters : God’s Hidden Politics in the Bible</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=nlebk&amp;AN=243970&amp;site=ehost-live" tags="Politics in the Bible,RELIGION / Biblical Studies / General">Politics and Theopolitics in the Bible and Postbiblical Literature</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://archive.org/stream/jesusspiralofv00hors" tags="Jesus Christ,History,Bible,Jews,Biblical teaching,Criticism, interpretation, etc,586 B.C.-70 A.D,Government, Resistance to,Judaism and state,Palestine,Religious aspects Judaism History,To 70 A.D,Views on resistance to government,Views on violence,Violence">Jesus and the Spiral of Violence: Popular Jewish Resistance in Roman Palestine</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://tdacad.com/product/think-differently-live-differently-book/">Think Differently Live Differently Keys to a Life of Freedom.</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.jstor.org/stable/10.5325/bullbiblrese.28.2.0165">The Prohibitions against Homosexual Sex in Leviticus 18:22 and 20:13: Are They Relevant Today?</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=pbh&amp;AN=118292952&amp;site=ehost-live" tags="CLERGY,COMMUNITY support,LGBTQ+ people,RELIGION,SOCIAL support,SPIRITUAL care (Medical care)">Opportunities for Ministering to LGBT Elders: A Conversation with Rev. Daniel Hooper</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=pbh&amp;AN=134749360&amp;site=ehost-live" tags="LGBTQ+ people,HUMILITY,MOTIVATION (Psychology),SHAME,VIRTUE">The politics of shame in the motivation to virtue: Lessons from the shame, pride, and humility experiences of LGBT conservative Christians and their allies</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://web.a.ebscohost.com/ehost/detail/detail?vid=0&amp;sid=dde61c0f-c3d9-457d-9c0b-92ab1888e956%40sdc-v-sessmgr02&amp;bdata=JnNpdGU9ZWhvc3QtbGl2ZQ%3d%3d">Sex without bodies: the church's response to the LGBT movement must be that matter matters</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.christianitytoday.com/ct/1990/march-5/homosexuality-elca-moves-against-churches.html">Homosexuality: ELCA Moves against Churches</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.christianitytoday.com/ct/2020/june-web-only/bostock-gorsuch-supreme-court-ruling-religious-liberty.html">LGBT Rights Ruling Isn’t the Beginning of the End for Religious Liberty</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.christianitytoday.com/news/2018/january/youth-group-leaders-generation-z-atheist-lgbt-teens-barna.html">Get Ready, Youth Group Leaders: Teens Twice as Likely to Identity of Atheist of LGBT</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.christianitytoday.com/news/2020/august/church-brethren-southeastern-district-divide-covenant-lgbt.html">Brethren Against Brethren: LGBT Fight Divides Peace Church.</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.christianitytoday.com/news/2019/april/bethany-christian-services-michigan-foster-lgbt-couples.html">America’s Largest Christian Adoption Agency Lets LGBT Couples Foster in 1 of 35 States</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.christianitytoday.com/news/2019/april/united-methodists-judicial-review-umc-traditional-plan-lgbt.html">United Methodist Court Keeps Core of New LGBT Legislation</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.reallifeministries.com/pastoral-care">Pastoral Care/Lay Counseling Interview: Real Life Ministries</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.counseling.org/knowledge-center/vistas/by-subject2/vistas-professional-development/docs/default-source/vistas/vistas_2005_vistas05-art53">Preventing Counselor Impairment: Vulnerability, Wellness, and Resilience</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.overdrive.com/search?q=9D69D7C1-4CDC-4FA2-883A-3484EAF746AD">The Quick-Reference Guide to Biblical Counseling: Personal and Emotional Issues</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://brossard.pretnumerique.ca/isbn/9780062893666">Optimal Outcomes Free Yourself from Conflict at Work, at Home, and in Life</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://site.ebrary.com/id/10754601">Counseling and Christianity: Five Approaches</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="http://www.nohiding.faith/p/resources.html">Resources @ NoHiding.Faith</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://open.bu.edu/handle/2144/22499">A history of the regular Baptists in Rhode Island, 1825-1931</a>
    </dt><dt><a href="https://historynewsnetwork.org/article/132813">Does the First Amendment Separate Church and State?</a>

    </dt><dt><a href="https://www.wsj.com/articles/supreme-court-to-decide-constitutional-right-to-deny-service-to-same-sex-couples-11645542502">Supreme Court to Hear Case of Website Designer Who Won’t Do Same-Sex Weddings</a>

    </dt><dt><a href="https://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=lsdar&amp;AN=ATLAiFZN210906001496&amp;site=ehost-live">Jesus and the Forces of Death: The Gospels' Portrayal of Ritual Impurity within First-Century Judaism</a>

    </dt><dt><a href="https://search.ebscohost.com/login.aspx?direct=true&amp;db=lsdar&amp;AN=ATLAiE8N200831004400&amp;site=ehost-live">Jesus and the Forces of Death: The Gospels' Portrayal of Ritual Impurity within First-Century Judaism</a>

Peterson (Author)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/346HLj1" target="_blank">Boundaries in Marriage by Henry Cloud</a>&nbsp; (Author), John Townsend&nbsp; (Author)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div>Reading or Read:</div><div><br /></div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/3bL1Q0O" target="_blank">It Starts with Food: Discover the Whole30 and Change Your Life in Unexpected Ways</a>, by Dallas and Melissa Hartwig ( #Whole30).&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/34482ic" target="_blank">How to Have That Difficult Conversation: Gaining the Skills for Honest and Meaningful Communication</a> by Henry Cloud&nbsp; (Author), John Townsend (Author)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/3dNP1F9" target="_blank">The Ketogenic Bible: The Authoritative Guide to Ketosis</a> by Jacob Wilson&nbsp; (Author), Ryan Lowery&nbsp; (Author)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/2JylFMR" target="_blank">Scary Close: Dropping the Act and Finding True Intimacy</a> by Donald Miller&nbsp; (Author), Bob Goff (Foreword)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/3aAfzHZ" target="_blank">How to Start and Build a SIX FIGURE Voice Over Business</a>: Set Your VO Career on Fire! by Bill DeWees (Author)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/2R3A1Jp" target="_blank">Blue Like Jazz: Nonreligious Thoughts on Christian Spirituality</a> by Donald Miller&nbsp; (Author)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/3azyd2p" target="_blank">Boundaries with Teens: When to Say Yes, How to Say No</a> John Townsend (Author)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/3aAJgbP" target="_blank">If You're In My Office, It's Already Too Late: A Divorce Lawyer's Guide to Staying Together</a> by James J. Sexton&nbsp; (Author)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><a href="https://amzn.to/2xFTc5j" target="_blank">Undaunted: Authentic Stories of Transformed Lives, East County, San Diego</a> by Barry Sappington (Author)</div></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><h4 style="text-align: left;"><b><u>The 2019 Reading List:</u></b></h4><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Leadership and Self-Deception: Getting Out of the Box</a>, by The Arbinger Institute<br /><br /></div><div><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Atomic Habits: An Easy &amp; Proven Way to Build Good Habits &amp; Break Bad Ones</a>, by James Clear<br /><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Where Is God When It Hurts?</a>, by Philip Yancey<br /><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Elements of a Christian Worldview</a>, by Michael Palmer<br /><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Saving the Bible from Ourselves: Learning to Read and Live the Bible Well</a>, by Glenn R. Paauw<br /><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Mere Christianity</a>&nbsp;Author: C.S. Lewis<br /><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">The Emotionally Healthy Leader: How Transforming Your Inner Life Will Deeply Transform Your Church, Team, and the World&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;Author: Peter Scazzero<br /><br /></div><div>By Author: Dr. Henry Cloud<br /><br /><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">How To Get A Date Worth Keeping: Be Dating In Six Months Or Your Money Back</a></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Boundaries in Dating: How Healthy Choices Grow Healthy Relationships</a></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Boundaries Updated and Expanded Edition: When to Say Yes, How to Say No To Take Control of Your Life</a></li></ul><br />Other not otherwise categorized<br /><br /></div><div><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">101 Conversation Starters for Couples</a>&nbsp;by Gary Chapman and Ramon Presson<br /><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">Intellectual Foreplay: A Book of Questions for Lovers and Lovers-to-Be</a>, by Eve Eschner Hogan<br /><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">41 Will Come: Holding On When Life Gets Tough--and Standing Strong Until a New Day Dawns</a>, by Tate, Chuck E.<br /><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/blog/post/edit/2308061808245109424/3136115369464457715#">The Hebrew-Greek Key Word Study Bible: NKJV Edition, Black Genuine Leather (Key Word Study Bibles),</a>&nbsp;by Publishers, AMG<br /><br /><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b>***</b></div><div><b>Other/Misc/Honourable Mentions</b><br /><br /><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/0743290313/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=0743290313&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">Darwin's Black Box: The Biochemical Challenge to Evolution</a><img border="0" src="https://images-blogger-opensocial.googleusercontent.com/gadgets/proxy?url=http%3A%2F%2Fir-na.amazon-adsystem.com%2Fe%2Fir%3Ft%3Dyour0f4d-20%26l%3Das2%26o%3D1%26a%3D0743290313&amp;container=blogger&amp;gadget=a&amp;rewriteMime=image%2F*" />,&nbsp;by&nbsp;Michael J. Behe&nbsp;(Author)</div><div>The author exposes giant holes in Darwin's failed theory of evolution.</div><div><br /></div><div><br /><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B0032CRODE/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B0032CRODE&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20">Expelled: No Intelligence Allowed</a><img border="0" src="https://images-blogger-opensocial.googleusercontent.com/gadgets/proxy?url=http%3A%2F%2Fir-na.amazon-adsystem.com%2Fe%2Fir%3Ft%3Dyour0f4d-20%26l%3Das2%26o%3D1%26a%3DB0032CRODE&amp;container=blogger&amp;gadget=a&amp;rewriteMime=image%2F*" />,&nbsp;by&nbsp;Ben Stein (Hosted by)&nbsp;</div><div>Ben Stein documentary (video) exposes the stupidity and NonScienctific position of most high schools and colleges in the USA; and why Intelligent Design should be a topic of discussion for any serious scientist.</div><br /><br /><i>*Disclosure of Material Connection: Some of the links on this page are “affiliate links.” This means if you click on the link and purchase the item, I will receive an affiliate commission. I may also have received one or more of the products or services mentioned above for free in the hope that I would mention it on my blog.<br /><br />Regardless, I only recommend products or services I use personally and believe will add value to my readers.<br /><br />I am disclosing this in accordance with the Federal Trade Commission’s&nbsp;<a href="http://www.gpo.gov/fdsys/pkg/CFR-2003-title16-vol1/content-detail.html">16 CFR, Part 255</a>: “Guides Concerning the Use of Endorsements and Testimonials in Advertising.” A Big Thank You to&nbsp;<a href="http://michaelhyatt.com/five-ways-to-comply-with-the-new-ftc-guidelines-for-bloggers.html">Michael Hyatt</a>&nbsp;for helping us Bloggers with these new legal disclosure requirements.<br /><br />As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another. (Proverbs 27:17 NIV)</i><br /><br /><br />That's all for now... but there's more to come.<br /><br /><b><i>Thanks for stopping by,</i></b><br /><b><br /></b>Darrell G. Wolfe<br /><br />Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant | Multipotentialite<br /><br /><i><b>PS: If you've hired me in the past or you are familiar with my work and you want to tell others about it, please leave a comment on this page.</b></i><br /></div></div></div></div>
</div>
